title: Roomio PBR map authoring conventions
status: DRAFT published by Agent H because Agent G (Realistic Rendering) has not yet shipped any code or schema. Pending Agent G + Agent D ratification (see roomio.txt REQUEST -> AGENT-G). Conventions are chosen to be CORRECT under the current renderer (<Canvas shadows flat> => NoToneMapping; legacy non-physical light units) AND forward-compatible with G's planned ACESFilmic + sRGB output + HDR IBL stack, so PBR maps authored to this spec need NO recolor when G lands.

renderer.material: THREE.MeshStandardMaterial (metal-roughness workflow) — used for ALL furniture

colorSpace.roughnessMap: linear — THREE.NoColorSpace (default); data map, NEVER set sRGB
colorSpace.normalMap: linear — THREE.NoColorSpace (default); data map, NEVER set sRGB
colorSpace.note: <Canvas flat> only sets NoToneMapping (the tonemap curve); it does NOT change texture color management. The sRGB-albedo / linear-data-map split holds today and is exactly what G's planned ACESFilmic+sRGB output expects.

normalMap.orientation: +Y (OpenGL / Y-up green channel). If a height->normal bake yields -Y (DirectX), invert the green channel at BAKE time, not runtime.
normalMap.guidance: derive from luminance/height; keep relief SUBTLE (weave/grain catches light), not embossed; expose material.normalScale for tuning

roughness.materialBaseline: material.roughness = 1.0 so the MAP fully drives roughness (three multiplies roughness * roughnessMap)

metalness.metallic: only for genuinely metallic detected surfaces (chrome/brass) emit a metalnessMap

ao.recommendation: H does NOT bake aoMap into tiling photo materials (a tiling patch has no meaningful contact AO). Let G provide contact AO via an SSAO/GTAO screen-space post-pass.
ao.uvChannel: three 0.169 unified UV via texture.channel — aoMap can reuse channel 0; a separate uv2 attribute is NOT required. (G brief's 'aoMap needs uv2' is pre-r150 framing — FLAGGED for G.)

tiling.wrap: wrapS = wrapT = THREE.RepeatWrapping on ALL maps (albedo + roughness + normal)
tiling.repeatRegistration: apply the SAME repeat.set(x,y) + rotation to all maps so they stay registered
tiling.worldSpace: tiling density is world-space: repeat derived per-mesh from worldDimCm / repeat_cm (mirrors the floor's areaCm contract in src/three/textures.ts). Keeps pattern scale physically consistent across differently-sized meshes.

delight: albedo MUST be de-lit (large-scale illumination flattened). Because G's IBL + E's lights do the lighting, baked highlights/shadows in albedo DOUBLE-light. This is a rendering-CORRECTNESS requirement (verified under a lit room, not a flat preview).

ownershipSeam.agentH_owns: per-material texture maps + each map's colorSpace / wrap / repeat / rotation / anisotropy / channel
ownershipSeam.agentE_and_G_own: renderer.toneMapping, renderer.outputColorSpace, scene.environment (HDR IBL / PMREMGenerator), bloom/SSAO passes, shadow config
ownershipSeam.rule: H must NOT set renderer-level state; G/E must NOT overwrite H's per-material maps. On a textured item, item.color stays as the fallback/tint.
